mapper.select: select ins.id, ins.symbol, ins.name, jsonb_agg(mc.currency_code) AS supported_currencies from instrument.instruments ins join instrument.market_currencies mc on mc.market_id = ins.market_id where ins.is_active = true and ins.user_id is null group by ins.id, ins.symbol, ins.name union all select ins.id, ins.symbol, ins.name, jsonb_build_array(ci.currency_code) AS supported_currencies from instrument.instruments ins join instrument.custom_instruments ci on ci.instrument_id = ins.id where ins.is_active = true and ins.user_id = #{userId} order by symbol
